hero.title: Every client, answered.
hero.subtitle: Chatblix brings Instagram, WhatsApp, Messenger, Telegram, and TikTok into one friendly inbox — with AI that replies in your voice, books appointments, and answers the little questions for you. You focus on your clients. We'll keep the conversations flowing.
hero.reassurance: No credit card. Setup in under 5 minutes. Cancel anytime.

integrations.eyebrow: Built for the apps your customers actually use
integrations.note: Official partners with Meta & TikTok APIs.

storyPivot.problem: Your customers are DMing you on six different apps.
storyPivot.tension: You are only looking at two.

replyFaster.title: One inbox. Every channel.
replyFaster.description: Stop tab-switching at 2 AM. Chatblix pulls every message into a single queue — prioritized, assigned, and ready for your team (or your AI) to reply in seconds.

benefits.title: Unified queue across 6 channels
benefits.description: WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, Telegram, TikTok, and email — all in one list, sorted by urgency.

benefits.title: Assign, tag, resolve — in one click
benefits.description: Route conversations to the right teammate. Tag VIPs. Mark resolved. Move on.

benefits.title: Reply from mobile or desktop
benefits.description: iOS, Android, and web. Pick up conversations wherever you are.

benefits.title: Never miss context
benefits.description: Customer history, past orders, and notes surface the moment a new message lands.

aiSupercharge.title: Your AI replies while you sleep.
aiSupercharge.description: Chatblix AI learns your brand voice, answers FAQs, qualifies leads, and hands off to your team the second a human is needed. It's like hiring a night-shift agent that never logs off.

heroMockup.customerMessage: Hey, is this still in stock? Need it by Friday 🙏
heroMockup.aiReply: Yes — last 4 in stock. Friday delivery is free if you order in the next 2 hours. Want me to save your size?

features.title: Smart auto-replies
features.description: AI drafts or sends replies trained on your brand tone and past tickets.

features.title: Intent-aware routing
features.description: Sales, support, billing — every message lands on the right teammate first try.

features.title: Automatic tagging
features.description: Priority, sentiment, topic, VIP — labeled the instant a message arrives.

features.title: One-click handoff
features.description: AI hands to a human when it's not sure. Humans hand back when it's repetitive.

features.title: Response analytics
features.description: Volume, response time, CSAT, per-teammate — all without a BI tool.

features.title: Every channel, one API
features.description: Native Meta & TikTok integrations — no webhooks duct-taped together.

mobileApp.title: Your inbox fits in your pocket.
mobileApp.description: Get push notifications the moment a customer DMs, reply with one tap, and watch your AI close the rest. Available on iOS and Android.
bullets: Offline drafts that sync when you're back

pricing.title: Pay for replies, not seats.
pricing.subtitle: Start free for 14 days. Upgrade when your inbox outgrows the starter plan.

faq.title: Questions, answered.
faq.subtitle: Everything you wanted to know before trying Chatblix.

items.question: Which channels does Chatblix support today?
items.answer: WhatsApp Business, Instagram DMs, Facebook Messenger, Telegram, TikTok DMs, and email — with direct Meta and TikTok API partnerships so nothing is scraped or fragile.

items.question: How does the AI actually reply to customers?
items.answer: Chatblix AI is trained on your brand voice, FAQs, and past conversations. It drafts or sends replies autonomously, escalates to a human when confidence drops, and never hallucinates product details — it only answers from your approved knowledge base.

items.question: Is my customer data safe?
items.answer: Conversations are encrypted in transit and at rest. We never train foundation models on your data. You own every message, and you can export or delete it at any time.

items.question: Can my whole team work in the same inbox?
items.answer: Yes. Assign conversations, leave internal notes, tag teammates, and track who replied to what. Admins get real-time visibility into response time and workload per person.

items.question: Do you have a mobile app?
items.answer: Yes — native iOS and Android apps with push notifications, voice replies, and offline drafts. Download them from the App Store or Google Play.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Under 10 minutes. Connect your Meta and TikTok business accounts, import your FAQs, and your AI is answering first-touch DMs the same afternoon.

footer.tagline: Every DM. One inbox. Zero missed leads.

features.title: What Chatblix Helps You Do?
features.subTitle: Simple tools to manage customer messages, work with your team, and grow your business.

featureData.title: All Messages in One Inbox
featureData.description: No more switching between apps! Brings all your messages together in one place, so you can reply faster and stay organized.

featureData.title: Team Work Made Easy
featureData.description: Have a team? Assign chats to the right person so customers always get a fast reply. No more missed messages or double replies.

featureData.title: Your Data is Safe
featureData.description: Get simple reports showing how many messages you've handled, how quickly you're replying, and how your team is doing.

featureData.title: 24/7 Availability
featureData.description: Never miss a customer message with round-the-clock monitoring and instant notifications.

scaleBusiness.title: Who is Chatblix for?
scaleBusiness.description: If you talk to customers online, Chatblix is for you.

audienceFeatures.text: Small business owners handling customer chats themselves
Growing teams managing conversations across multiple platforms
Online sellers responding to inquiries, orders, and payments
Service providers who want faster and more organized replies

scaleBusiness.closingText: Whether you're running a one-person shop or managing a team, Chatblix helps you reply faster, stay organized, and grow your business.

chatbot.title: Create Your AI Chatbots in Minutes
chatbot.subTitle: Create chatbots for sales, support, and more. Build intelligent conversational experiences that engage your customers 24/7 with our powerful AI platform.
